name: imc-skills
description: Depth pack for ACM Internet Measurement Conference (IMC) venue routing, the two-deadline One-Shot-Revision cycle, double-blind acmart submission, measurement ethics and responsible disclosure, dataset/vantage-point methodology, artifact-availability and the Replicability Track, and the Community Contribution Award.

plugins.name: imc-skills
plugins.description: Twelve IMC-specific skills for the ACM Internet Measurement Conference, the SIGCOMM-sponsored empirical measurement flagship, grounded in the IMC 2026 call for papers, submission instructions, committees page, SIGCOMM/IMC event pages, the ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
